# MerrySails — Complete Site Content for AI

> This is the full content index of MerrySails (merrysails.com), operated by Merry Tourism — a TURSAB A Group licensed travel agency in Istanbul, Turkey, offering Bosphorus cruises, dinner cruises, yacht charters, and boat tours since 2001.

## Company Information
- **Name:** Merry Tourism (trading as MerrySails)
- **License:** TURSAB A Group Travel Agency
- **Founded:** 2001
- **Address:** Alemdar Mah. Divanyolu Cad. Ogul Han No:62 Ic Kapi No: 402, 34093 Fatih/Istanbul, Turkey
- **Phone:** +90 537 040 68 22 / +90 536 414 66 05
- **Email:** info@merrysails.com
- **WhatsApp:** +90 537 040 68 22
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 (2,847 reviews)
- **Guests Served:** 50,000+
- **Languages:** English, Turkish, Arabic, Russian
- **Cancellation:** Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure
- **Payment:** Credit card, bank transfer, cash (EUR/USD/TRY)

---

## All Tours

### Bosphorus Sunset Cruise
- URL: https://merrysails.com/cruises/bosphorus-sunset-cruise
- Price: From EUR20/person (was EUR40)
- Duration: 2.5 hours
- Capacity: Max 40 guests
- Departure: 17:00 / 18:00 (seasonal) from Eminonu Pier
- Route: Eminonu -> Maiden's Tower -> Dolmabahce -> Ortakoy -> Rumeli Fortress -> Return
- Rating: 4.93/5 (621 reviews)
- Includes: Welcome drinks, Live commentary, Open bar (soft drinks), Snack platter, WiFi
- Highlights: Maiden's Tower, Dolmabahce Palace, Ortakoy Mosque, Rumeli Fortress, Bosphorus Bridge
- Description: Experience the magic of Istanbul as the sun sets over the Bosphorus. Sail past iconic landmarks bathed in golden light on this unforgettable evening cruise.

### Bosphorus Dinner Cruise & Turkish Night
- URL: https://merrysails.com/cruises/bosphorus-dinner-cruise
- Price: From EUR65/person
- Duration: 3.5 hours
- Capacity: Max 150 guests
- Departure: 19:30 from Eminonu Pier
- Route: Eminonu -> Full Bosphorus Tour -> Return
- Rating: 4.88/5 (312 reviews)
- Includes: Hotel pickup & drop-off, 4-course Turkish dinner, Unlimited local drinks, Live music & DJ, Belly dance show, Whirling dervish performance
- Highlights: Turkish Night entertainment, Live belly dancing, Whirling dervish ceremony, Illuminated Bosphorus views, 4-course dinner
- Standard Package: EUR65 — All-inclusive dinner cruise with entertainment
- Gold Package: EUR95 — Premium reserved seating with panoramic views

### Yacht Charter in Istanbul
- URL: https://merrysails.com/cruises/yacht-charter-in-istanbul
- Price: From EUR280
- Duration: 2 hours (extendable)
- Capacity: Max 15 guests
- Departure: Flexible from Kurucesme Marina
- Rating: 5.0/5 (65 reviews)
- Includes: Private yacht & crew, Tea coffee & water, Bluetooth sound system, Professional captain, Flexible route
- Essential Package: EUR280 — 2-hour private cruise
- Premium Package: EUR380 — Larger yacht with snacks
- VIP Package: EUR680 — Top-tier luxury charter with food
- Add-ons: Photographer (EUR190), Violinist (EUR180), DJ (EUR250), Belly Dancer (EUR180-190), Unlimited Alcoholic Drinks (EUR50-65), 4-Course Meal (EUR35/person), Extra Hour (EUR125-300)

### Bosphorus Short Cruise
- URL: https://merrysails.com/cruises/bosphorus-sightseeing-cruise
- Price: From EUR15/person
- Duration: 1.5 hours
- Capacity: Max 50 guests
- Departure: 10:00 / 14:00 / 16:00 from Eminonu Pier
- Rating: 4.75/5 (445 reviews)
- Includes: Audio guide (12 languages), Soft drinks, WiFi, Photo spots
- Highlights: Maiden's Tower, Dolmabahce Palace, Ortakoy Mosque, Continental views, Affordable sightseeing

- Capacity: Max 15 guests
- Departure: Timed with sunset from Kurucesme Marina
- Rating: 4.95/5 (89 reviews)

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does a Bosphorus cruise cost?**
Prices start from EUR15 for a sightseeing cruise, EUR20 for a sunset cruise, EUR65 for a dinner cruise with entertainment, and EUR280+ for a private yacht charter.

**Where do cruises depart from?**
Shared cruises depart from Eminonu Pier (accessible by T1 tram). Private yacht charters depart from Kurucesme Marina.

**Is free cancellation available?**
Yes, free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure for a full refund.

**Do you offer hotel pickup?**
Hotel pickup and drop-off is included with dinner cruises at no extra cost.

**Is MerrySails licensed?**
Yes, operated by Merry Tourism, a TURSAB A Group licensed travel agency since 2001.

**Can I book a private yacht?**
Yes, private yacht charters start from EUR280 for 2 hours. Available for proposals, birthdays, weddings, and corporate events.

---
